text:
Author: rm
Date: Fri Sep 14 20:31:57 2012
New Revision: 304296
URL: http://svn.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/304296

Log:
  - update bacula-server and bacula-docs to 5.2.12
  
  This release fixes crash of bacula director (bug #1932)
  
  PR:		171648
  Submitted by:	Dan Langille <dan at langille dot org> (maintainer)

Modified:
  head/sysutils/bacula-docs/Makefile
  head/sysutils/bacula-docs/distinfo
  head/sysutils/bacula-server/Makefile

==============================================================================

+++ head/sysutils/bacula-docs/Makefile	Fri Sep 14 20:31:57 2012	(r304296)

 #

-PORTVERSION=	5.2.11

 CATEGORIES=	sysutils
